author.bio: Serving your sites over HTTPS+HTTP/2 automatically. On a mission to put every site on HTTPS! Visit our forum for help: http://caddy.community
author.name: Caddy Web Server

content.text: Oooo, two new plugins around the corner: http.jekyll (like the hugo plugin, by @hacdias) and http.awses (Elasticsearch Service).
content.html: Oooo, two new plugins around the corner: http.jekyll (like the hugo plugin, by @hacdias) and http.awses (Elasticsearch Service).
